creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed to ports/www/calamaris with the following changes: 

(1) Upgraded 2.16 -> 2.8 
(2) pkg/COMMENT never contains the name of the port 
(3) Since we 'officially' support 3.0 and beyond, I removed USE_PERL5 
(4) I merged your complex scripts/pre-configure + patches/patch-aa into 
one sed(1) expression in a post-patch directive. This truely is  
a much simpler way to accomplish what you did. 

#4 actually isn't required at all (3.0 has perl5 located in /usr/bin/perl) 
but I and many others still haven't converted, and the change is rather 
simple.
